---
title: "10. 看不见的东西如何被看见"
subtitle: "How the Unseen Becomes Observable"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 10
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `observation_refinement_reduces_error` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `observation_refinement_reduces_error`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_10_fiber_scan_observation.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
